name: Venice Beach Skatepark
description: A legendary beachfront skatepark featuring flowing bowls, rails, and endless ocean views. Popular with locals and professional skaters alike.

name: Stapelbäddsparken
description: One of Europe's largest concrete skateparks, offering massive bowls, technical street lines, and competition-level obstacles.

name: House of Vans London
description: An iconic indoor skatepark beneath Waterloo Station featuring bowls, mini ramps, street obstacles, and a vibrant graffiti-covered atmosphere.

name: Aljada Skate Park
description: A modern outdoor skatepark with smooth concrete, beginner-friendly flow lines, and street features suitable for all skill levels.

name: Leeside Skatepark
description: A legendary DIY concrete skatepark built beneath a bridge, known for its creative transitions, bowls, and authentic skate culture.

name: KAOS Temple Skatepark
description: A unique indoor skatepark combining artistic design with flowing bowls, ramps, and technical street features in a former industrial building.

name: Peitruss Skatepark
description: A modern concrete skatepark set in the Pétrusse Valley, featuring flowing bowls, hips, ledges, and street elements suitable for all-around skating.

name: The Cradle Skatepark
description: A world-class concrete skatepark featuring deep bowls, flowing transitions, and technical street obstacles designed for experienced riders.

name: Galit Skatepark
description: One of Israel's most iconic skateparks, known for its smooth concrete layout, bowls, rails, and vibrant local skate scene.

name: Jiangwan Skatepark
description: A spacious urban concrete skatepark offering a balanced mix of bowls, banks, rails, and street features for skaters of varying skill levels.

name: Lauridsen Skatepark
description: One of the largest skateparks in the United States, featuring Olympic-level street and park courses, snake runs, bowls, and flowing concrete lines.

name: Fælledparken Skatepark
description: A large concrete skatepark divided into multiple zones, offering smooth flow sections and technical street obstacles for every skill level.

name: Robb Field Skatepark
description: A legendary Southern California skatepark featuring a large bowl, street plaza, volcano, rails, and fast flowing lines.

name: Jake's Skate Park
description: A modern waterfront skatepark with rails, ledges, stairs, banks, and beginner-friendly flow sections overlooking Baltimore Harbor.

name: Örebro Skatepark
description: One of Sweden's premier concrete skateparks, combining expansive street sections with bowls and transition areas in a central park setting.
